# Burky Flow — Full Content Index for AI Crawlers

> AI automation agency for service businesses. We turn missed calls and dormant leads into booked revenue with AI voice, reactivation, CRM, and workflow systems we build and run for you.

Burky Flow is an AI automation agency. We operate remotely and serve clients across the United States. Focus metros: Houston TX, San Antonio TX, Charleston SC, Greenville SC. We do not maintain physical offices in those cities; we declare them as remotely served areas only.

---

## Services (full descriptions)

### AI Voice Receptionist
URL: https://burkyflow.com/services/ai-voice-receptionist
Most missed calls go to a competitor who picked up second. A human-sounding AI voice answers on the first ring, qualifies the caller, and books the job straight into your calendar.
How it works:
1. Connect your existing number or after-hours line to the AI voice. No new hardware.
2. Train it on your services, pricing guardrails, booking rules, and tone.
3. Every call is captured, qualified, logged, and pushed to your CRM or scheduler.
Why it matters: A single missed emergency call can be a four-figure job handed to the shop that answered.

### Database Reactivation
URL: https://burkyflow.com/services/database-reactivation
You already paid to acquire every past customer and dead lead in your database. We re-engage them by SMS in your tone, and the AI voice books the ones who are ready.
How it works:
1. We pull a reachable-contact count from your CRM so you see the opportunity first.
2. A short, on-brand SMS sequence reaches past customers and dormant leads.
3. Replies are handled by AI voice, qualified, and dropped onto your calendar.
Why it matters: Reactivating an existing list costs a fraction of new clicks, and those people already trust you.

### CRM and Lead Systems
URL: https://burkyflow.com/services/crm-lead-systems
Leads leak when they live across a phone, an inbox, and three apps. We build one pipeline where every lead is captured, routed, and followed up automatically.
How it works:
1. Map your real sales stages, sources, and hand-off points.
2. Wire up capture from forms, calls, ads, and chats with the source attached.
3. Automate speed-to-lead texts, reminders, and reactivation.
Why it matters: Most leads are won or lost in the first five minutes.

### Workflow Automation
URL: https://burkyflow.com/services/workflow-automation
The repetitive copy-paste between your booking app, CRM, invoicing, and inbox is where hours and accuracy disappear. We connect them into reliable workflows.
How it works:
1. Document the daily manual handoffs and where they break.
2. Build, test, and assign an owner and fallback for each workflow.
3. Monitor, catch failures early, and tune as you grow.
Why it matters: Manual handoffs quietly drop the customer who fell between two systems.

### Answer Engine Optimization
URL: https://burkyflow.com/services/answer-engine-optimization
Buyers now ask AI search for a recommendation. We structure your site and content so answer engines cite you as the trusted local choice.
How it works:
1. Audit how AI engines currently describe your business.
2. Add schema, clear entity data, and answer-shaped content.
3. Build consistent, factual coverage to reinforce authority over time.
Why it matters: Being left off an AI assistant's shortlist is the new page two.

### Done For You Service Model
URL: https://burkyflow.com/services/done-for-you
We build, run, and maintain the entire automation stack so you get the outcome without the operations.
How it works:
1. Agree on the result you want, in your numbers, up front.
2. Stand up receptionist, reactivation, CRM, and workflows as one connected system.
3. Operate and report: one team, one dashboard, one point of contact.
Why it matters: A pile of disconnected tools is fragile; one owned system is reliable.

---

## Industries

 - Home and Property Services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, lawn and pest): https://burkyflow.com/industries/home-services
 - Healthcare and Practices (dental, medspa): https://burkyflow.com/industries/healthcare
 - Real Estate Teams: https://burkyflow.com/industries/real-estate
 - Automotive and Repair: https://burkyflow.com/industries/automotive
 - Professional Firms (law, staffing): https://burkyflow.com/industries/professional-firms

## Geo landing pages (organic)

Pattern: https://burkyflow.com/ai-automation/[niche]/[city]
Examples:
 - https://burkyflow.com/ai-automation/hvac/houston
 - https://burkyflow.com/ai-automation/plumbing/san-antonio
 - https://burkyflow.com/ai-automation/real-estate/charleston
 - https://burkyflow.com/ai-automation/dental/greenville
